case_title: CSC CREDIT SERVICES, INC., A CALIF CORPORATION vs. ABSON, LUCIUS et al

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: MATTHEWS, ARTURO E JR. SUBSTITUTED FOR WEISS, MILTON S AS ATTORNEY FOR CSC CREDIT SERVICES, INC., A CALIF CORPORATION
